name: Radish Spread
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons dill or basil, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and trim the radishes.
2. In a food processor fitted with a steel blade, grate the radishes and herbs briefly.
3. Add the cream cheese and lemon juice to the food processor and blend until smooth.
4. Refrigerate the spread.
5. Serve on crackers or thin slices of bread.
